import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    BALL, PYRAMID, HEX = 3, 5, 11
    BLUE, GREEN, YELLOW = 3, 2, 5

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W - 2)

    # --- Pocket states ---
    prev_pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)
    prev_holding_green_ball = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    next_holding_green_ball = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    next_pocket_empty = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)

    pickup_event = prev_pocket_empty & next_holding_green_ball
    putdown_event = prev_holding_green_ball & next_pocket_empty

    # --- Find blue pyramid (use state for phase 1, since it disappears on pickup) ---
    bp_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    bp_count_s = jnp.sum(bp_mask_s)
    bp_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * bp_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_s, 1)
    bp_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * bp_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_s, 1)

    bp_mask_ns = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    bp_count_ns = jnp.sum(bp_mask_ns)
    bp_y_ns = jnp.sum(yy * bp_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_ns, 1)
    bp_x_ns = jnp.sum(xx * bp_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_ns, 1)

    # --- Find yellow hex ---
    yh_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yh_count = jnp.sum(yh_mask)
    yh_y = jnp.sum(yy * yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(yh_count, 1)
    yh_x = jnp.sum(xx * yh_mask) / jnp.maximum(yh_count, 1)

    # Agent positions
    prev_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    prev_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    next_y = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    next_x = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # --- Phase 1: approach blue pyramid ---
    prev_dist_bp = jnp.abs(prev_y - bp_y_s) + jnp.abs(prev_x - bp_x_s)
    next_dist_bp = jnp.abs(next_y - bp_y_ns) + jnp.abs(next_x - bp_x_ns)
    # Use state pyramid location for both (before pickup)
    next_dist_bp_from_state = jnp.abs(next_y - bp_y_s) + jnp.abs(next_x - bp_x_s)
    approach_bp = (prev_dist_bp - next_dist_bp_from_state) / max_dist

    # Phase 1 active: not holding green ball, pyramid exists
    phase1_active = ~prev_holding_green_ball & ~next_holding_green_ball & (bp_count_s > 0)
    phase1_reward = jnp.where(phase1_active, approach_bp * 0.3, 0.0)

    # --- Pickup bonus ---
    pickup_bonus = jnp.where(pickup_event, 2.0, 0.0)

    # --- Phase 2: approach yellow hex while holding green ball ---
    prev_dist_yh = jnp.abs(prev_y - yh_y) + jnp.abs(prev_x - yh_x)
    next_dist_yh = jnp.abs(next_y - yh_y) + jnp.abs(next_x - yh_x)
    approach_yh = (prev_dist_yh - next_dist_yh) / max_dist

    phase2_active = next_holding_green_ball & (yh_count > 0)
    phase2_reward = jnp.where(phase2_active, approach_yh * 0.3, 0.0)

    # --- Bonus: agent is adjacent to yellow hex while holding green ball ---
    # This encourages getting close before putting down
    adj_to_hex = (next_dist_yh <= 1.5) & next_holding_green_ball & (yh_count > 0)
    prev_adj_to_hex = (prev_dist_yh <= 1.5) & prev_holding_green_ball & (yh_count > 0)
    just_became_adjacent = adj_to_hex & ~prev_adj_to_hex
    adjacent_bonus = jnp.where(just_became_adjacent, 1.0, 0.0)

    # --- Task completion: putdown green ball adjacent to yellow hex ---
    green_ball_mask = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask)
    gb_y = jnp.sum(yy.astype(jnp.float32) * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(gb_count, 1)
    gb_x = jnp.sum(xx.astype(jnp.float32) * green_ball_mask) / jnp.maximum(gb_count, 1)
    dist_ball_hex = jnp.abs(gb_y - yh_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x - yh_x)

    # Success: putdown event AND green ball is adjacent to yellow hex
    success = putdown_event & (gb_count > 0) & (yh_count > 0) & (dist_ball_hex <= 1.5)
    success_bonus = jnp.where(success, 10.0, 0.0)

    # Penalty for wrong putdown (placed but not adjacent to hex)
    wrong_putdown = putdown_event & ~success
    wrong_penalty = jnp.where(wrong_putdown, -0.5, 0.0)

    total_reward = (phase1_reward + pickup_bonus + phase2_reward + adjacent_bonus + success_bonus + wrong_penalty)
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
